# Soft8 Tool400 Grep20 Contract

## Soft 8
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.08 with quality bias floor 0.06 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Tool 400
tool result budgets default to 400 chars with 5-char previews for denser reclaim

## Grep 20
Grep head defaults to 20 lines for denser search results

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/status/footer vitest
